title: Lead Qualifying & Email n8n Workflow
description: A ready-to-use n8n workflow template that automates lead qualification and sends personalized follow-up emails, helping sales teams save time on manual lead scoring and outreach.
gumroad_description:
You're losing deals because you're still manually scoring leads and writing follow-up emails one by one.

---

WHO THIS IS FOR

— Solo founders running outbound without a sales team
— SDRs and AEs tired of copy-pasting the same follow-up sequences
— Ops people who want to plug lead qualification into an existing n8n stack

---

WHAT'S INSIDE

— A 9-node n8n workflow that qualifies leads automatically based on your criteria
— Personalized follow-up email logic that adapts to each lead's score
— Importable JSON file — drop it into n8n and it runs
— A plain-English setup guide so you're not guessing at configuration

---

No coding required. No subscription. No bloated CRM feature you'll never touch.

You get a working system that handles the repetitive part of outreach so you can focus on conversations that actually close.

Download and use it today.

Discover more tools like this at mini-on-ai.com
